avisos.texto_aviso: Prescriptions ready for collection after 2 p.m. Please bring your ID.
Free haircut for children under 5 every Tuesday morning. Walk-ins welcome.
Parcels over 20 kg cannot be accepted at this counter.
Self-checkout lanes are for baskets with 15 items or fewer.
Members get 10% off all new releases and a free bookmark with every purchase.
Platform 4 is currently closed for maintenance. Please use platform 6 for all southbound services.
Please have your passport and boarding pass ready. Baggage must not exceed 23 kg.
A full tank and a valid driving licence are required before you can drive the vehicle away.
Vehicles must be on board thirty minutes before departure. Foot passengers should proceed to the waiting lounge.
We do not carry out bodywork repairs, only engine and electrical diagnostics.

banco_opciones.H: tourist information office (reservada para el ejemplo 0)

avisos.texto_aviso: Books must be returned within three weeks or a small daily fine will apply.
Dogs must be kept on a leash at all times near the children's playground.
Marriage licence applications are only processed between 9 a.m. and noon, Monday to Friday.
Swimming caps are compulsory at all times. Diving is not permitted in the shallow end.
To report a lost item or a minor incident, please speak to the officer at the front desk.
Tables cannot be reserved after 9 p.m. on weekends; we operate on a first-come, first-served basis after that time.
Check-out time is 11 a.m. Late check-out may be arranged for an extra fee, subject to availability.
Shared dormitory rooms include lockers, but guests must bring their own padlock.
Fresh loaves come out of the oven at 6 a.m., 10 a.m., and 3 p.m. daily.
All flavours are made fresh daily; please ask staff about today's vegan and dairy-free options.
Visiting hours for patients in the intensive care unit are strictly limited to two people at a time.
Please arrive fifteen minutes early for X-rays; anaesthesia may cause temporary numbness afterward.
Members must wipe down equipment after use and return weights to the designated racks.
Please arrive with an empty stomach and bring your own mat; blocks and straps are provided.
Exercises must be performed exactly as demonstrated by your therapist to avoid re-injury.
